race.comment: SIR NOW (1) is an absolute rock for the Hewitt stable and is sure to be putting his best foot forward again. Concedes weight to a few of his main dangers but is going too good to leave off the top. DEEPFLOAT DIVA (10) was better last time here without causing any real threat. At his top now and gets significant weight off. Finally draws a gate and if he brings his A-game he can knock off the fav. WINNING REVOLUTION (4) is a tricky one to catch. Doesn't win out of turn but possesses a strong turn of foot on his day. If they overdo it in front he can pounce on them late. VOLCANIC EXPRESS (2) was strong through the line when resuming off 399 days at Murray Bridge two weeks ago. Always cautious second-up off such a long break but he deserves safe keeping. SUPER ALANA (6) hasn't been as effective of late but is a speedy mare that can give plenty of cheek if left alone.
